CASE-20260225-17f2eb.description: Inspector A. Mehra investigated a burglary at 221B West Ridge Apartments, Sector 9, on February 14, 2026 (Case ID: FR-017-2026). Complainant Mr. Rohan Malhotra reported forced entry through the living room window, with a broken latch and glass fragments found inside. A laptop and DSLR camera were stolen. Key evidence collected includes a kitchen knife, a muddy shoe print near the window, and fingerprints lifted from the window frame. Preliminary observations suggest forced entry, but no signs of struggle or blood stains were found. The incident remains under investigation, with further forensic analysis of fingerprints and the knife pending.
